## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Adventures Group to discuss organic growth strategies, content development, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic revenue growth appears positive, but more accurate tracking of transactions is needed](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [New "Gourmet Table Experience" tour name implemented for SEO purposes](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Plans to implement schema markup for tourist attractions and trips to boost SEO](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Proposed development of programmatic travel guide pages to enhance user experience and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Exploring integration of Instagram content to generate dynamic, location-based articles](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

## Topics

### Organic Revenue Growth

  - [November shows high revenue due to multiple sales events (Black Friday, Cyber Monday, Mexico-specific sale)](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Analytics revenue data was skewed before mid-March; now fixed](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Number of organic transactions growing more than other channels](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Team to track monthly organic performance moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

### Content Development and Publishing

  - [H2 headers successfully added to blog fields](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Some content repetition across monthly "Things to Do" articles is acceptable, but text should be unique](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Team needs to scale up publishing efforts to address recent traffic plateau](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Seven articles completed for the week, pending review](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)

### Tour Updates

  - ["Traveler's Table" tour renamed to "Gourmet Table Experience" for SEO purposes](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Same experience offered in Cancun and Playa del Carmen with slight variations](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### SEO Improvements

  - [Plans to implement schema markup for tourist attractions and trips](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Proposed development of programmatic travel guide pages, inspired by Lonely Planet's format](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Potential integration of Instagram content to create dynamic, location-based articles](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

### Website Enhancements

  - [Exploring addition of image captions for proper attribution](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Considering creation of custom Google Maps layers for interactive content](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Manually update AI-generated content to reflect new "Gourmet Table Experience" tour name](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Review and publish pending articles, prioritizing those with available images](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Explore implementation of schema markup with development team](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Share programmatic page mockup with development team for feasibility assessment](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Investigate options for creating custom Google Maps layers for interactive content](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)
  - [Continue developing Instagram content integration workflow](https://fathom.video/share/H8Rz49TRR8NHKWY7NwZXYtBLGmrEGtUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
